title: cracca glabella
intro: Cracca glabella, also known as the butterfly pea, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa and Asia, belonging to the legume family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cracca glabella include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as a natural diuretic. The plant can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as tea, capsules, and infusions, allowing individuals to harness its potential health benefits.
